summary: Lead accepts M3 tribute and troop obligation fulfillment after writer R3, systems_architect R3 ACCEPT, and independent qa_reviewer ACCEPT. The implementation stays within the task allowed paths, adds explicit vassalage-sourced obligation categories and settlement actions, separates nominal/due/delivered/arrears/default/remission accounting, draws tribute from existing M2 resource stocks, keeps troop settlement as M3 headcount commitment placeholders only, exposes deterministic reason codes and audit trails, and rejects duplicate, overfull, wrong-actor, wrong-period, illegal-vassalage, and partial-then-deferral over-collection paths.

tests_run.command: validate-handoff for all M3-TRIBUTE-TROOP-OBLIGATIONS-001 outbox handoffs
tests_run.result: All writer, systems, QA, and lead handoffs available before this file validated successfully where applicable.
Task id, ACCEPTED status, lead route, qa_reviewer thread, allowed paths, forbidden paths, and required tests are present.
No matches; rg returns 1 when no authority-breaking time/random use is found.

tests_run.command: rg -n framework/fs import search in packages/sim-core packages/protocol
tests_run.result: No React, Pixi, Electron, fs, or node:fs import matches.
Node and worker-compatible hashes matched for hello 61e0ba1c, command/query d275faa4, and save/load 28074edd; save/load byte length 10920.
Architecture boundaries passed; root Vitest 23 files/145 tests passed; web Vitest 1 file/3 tests passed.
Targeted M3 obligation test file passed; 11 tests passed.

decisions: ACCEPT: M3 deferral after any current due-period delivery is invalid, which avoids implicit rollover semantics and prevents over-collection.
ACCEPT: Non-resource settlements use sim.obligation-settled / settled with actionKind detail rather than overloading fulfillment semantics.
ACCEPT: Troop obligations in this task are commitment/headcount readiness placeholders only and do not implement M4 army movement, battle, campaign, supply, siege, or full war systems.
ACCEPT: M3 save-format support remains intentionally deferred to M3-SAVE-RUNTIME-001 because packages/save-format is forbidden for this task.
risks: Existing MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON warning remains in the deterministic RNG worker fixture and is not introduced by this task.
Rollover of already delivered tribute is intentionally not modeled in M3; if needed later, it requires a separate design task with explicit accounting semantics.
requested_action: Commit, push, create PR, wait for CI, merge to main, sync main, then mark M3-TRIBUTE-TROOP-OBLIGATIONS-001 CLOSED and continue to the next READY M3 task.
